name: German Leaven
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 100 grams flour with 100 milliliters water in a bowl. Cover and let rest for 24-48 hours at 20°C.
2. Add an equal amount of flour and water to the mixture. Mix well, cover, and let rest for 24 hours.
3. Add 200 grams flour and 200 milliliters water. Mix thoroughly, cover, and let rest for 24 hours.
It should have a pleasant acidic smell and will last for one bread (or another recipe), leaving 100 grams of leaven for the quicker leavening process.
Leavening Process: Add 100 grams of leaven, 350 grams rye flour, and 350 milliliters water at 40°C. Mix well and let rest for 12-24 hours at 20°C.
Store the remaining leaven in the refrigerator up to 8 days between baking sessions. For longer storage (up to four weeks), add more rye flour to the mixture until it becomes crumbly.
